name: The Kaneshita Construction Co.,Ltd.
summary: The Kaneshita Construction Co.,Ltd. provides planning, survey, supervision, design, and construction services in Japan. The company engages in carrying out civil engineering works, such as roads, tunnels, bridges, river maintenance, etc., as well as public works, road pavement works, and social infrastructures; and design and construction of buildings, such as medical/welfare/commercial facilities, private homes, educational and childcare facilities, condominiums, and public and private constructions, as well as renovations, expansions, repair, and maintenance works. It also manufactures and sells construction paving materials, including asphalt mixture; and recycles industrial waste and waste asphalt into recycled asphalt mix and roadbed. The company was founded in 1935 and is headquartered in Miyazu, Japan.
